'''David West Reynolds''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he wrote a brief manual outlining the virtues of the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''[[TIE Fighter: A Pocket Manual]]'' is written as an [[in-universe]] document, and author [[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]] cast himself as the book's heavily biased [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] author.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-10-07 -->''[[TIE Fighter: A Pocket Manual]]''
